# SpatialAudioPlayer3D.IgnoreFloor property

When enabled, rays pointing downward (below [`FloorAngleThreshold`](./FloorAngleThreshold.md)) are excluded from room-size and openness calculations. This prevents the floor (which is almost always present) from shrinking the perceived room size.

```csharp
public bool IgnoreFloor { get; set; }
```
